with_check_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = auth.uid()) AND (profiles.role = 'abo'::text))))

using_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (profiles p
     JOIN store_master sm ON ((sm.abo = p.full_name)))
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (p.role = 'abo'::text) AND (demands.store_name = sm.store_name))))

policy_name: Admins and LMs can insert demands
with_check_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = auth.uid()) AND (profiles.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'lm'::text])))))

policy_name: Admins and LMs can read all demands
using_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = auth.uid()) AND (profiles.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'lm'::text])))))

with_check_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = auth.uid()) AND (profiles.role = 'lm'::text))))

policy_name: LMs can read their store demands
using_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (profiles p
     JOIN store_master sm ON ((sm.lm_name = p.full_name)))
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (p.role = 'lm'::text) AND (demands.store_name = sm.store_name))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (p.role = 'owner'::text) AND (demands.action_owner ~~* (('%'::text || p.full_name) || '%'::text)))))

with_check_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = auth.uid()) AND (profiles.role = 'store'::text))))

policy_name: Store staff can read own store demands
using_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (p.role = 'store'::text) AND (demands.store_name = p.store_name))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = auth.uid()) AND (profiles.role = 'store'::text))))

policy_name: managers and directors can read demands
using_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = auth.uid()) AND (profiles.role = ANY (ARRAY['manager'::text, 'director'::text])))))
